page_metadata.biotools__summary: Translates bedtools command-line invocations to R code calling functions from the BioConductor *Ranges infrastructure. This is intended to educate novice BioConductor users and to compare the syntax and semantics of the two frameworks.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Translates bedtools command-line invocations to R code calling functions from the BioConductor *Ranges infrastructure. This is intended to educate novice BioConductor users and to compare the syntax and semantics of the two frameworks.
